metadata.description: Official plugins for The Network State ecosystem

plugins.name: ns-design-system
plugins.description: Apply NS design system guidelines when creating or reviewing UI components. Use when building new UI features, styling components, or reviewing frontend code.

plugins.name: ns-internal-dashboard
plugins.description: Conventions, patterns, and gotchas for the NS admin dashboard. Use when working on admin tables, analytics charts, filters, impersonation, or any feature under /admin routes.

plugins.name: ns-git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow conventions for the NS monorepo: commits, branching, pre-commit hooks, merge conflicts, and CI. Use when committing, pushing, creating PRs, resolving merge conflicts, fixing hook failures, or managing migrations and lock files.
